expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Uses raw curl: 'POST /wiki/rest/api/content/54321/child/attachment'. States 'I cannot complete this task.'

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs update-page 54321 with body containing ac:image macro
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Uses raw curl PUT request to update the page.
